settings.heading: Slow rituals for everyday hair.
settings.lead: Botanically-led haircare made in small batches. Cold-pressed oils, plant proteins, and pH-balanced cleansers — formulated for scalp and shine, not just shelf appeal.

settings.heading: Slow-batched
settings.body: Brewed in 20-litre batches at our Brooklyn studio. No fillers, no shortcuts.

settings.heading: Cruelty-free
settings.body: Leaping Bunny certified. Never tested on animals, anywhere.

settings.heading: Glass + refill
settings.body: Every bottle is glass. Refills ship in 100% recycled aluminium pouches.

settings.heading: 30-day return
settings.body: If it doesn't feel right on your scalp, send it back. No questions.

settings.heading: Cold-pressed argan oil.
settings.lead: Sourced from a single cooperative in Morocco's Souss-Massa region. We pay 2.4× the regional standard so the women who press it can keep their land.

settings.headline: Strengthens
settings.body: Vitamin E + omega 9 restore hair's protein structure.

settings.headline: Conditions
settings.body: Replaces stripped lipids on the hair shaft.

settings.headline: Protects
settings.body: Light enough for daily use; heavy enough to seal split ends.

settings.heading: Visible difference in 14 days.
settings.body: 32 participants, independent split-test, half-head methodology. Drag the slider to see week 4.
settings.stat_label: Shine measured by gloss meter, week 4

settings.heading: Find your routine in 60 seconds.
settings.body: A short quiz that asks about your scalp, your hair texture, and your week. Then it recommends a 3-step kit.
settings.support: Free · 60 seconds · 87% match rate · No email required

settings.heading: Twenty-litre batches, three days a week.
settings.body: Every formula is brewed in twenty-litre batches at our Brooklyn studio. We test each batch on real hair before it leaves the building. If it doesn't pass, we pour it out.

settings.heading: Started by a trichologist.
settings.copy: I trained as a trichologist after my own scalp issues went undiagnosed for years. Helio is the line I wished existed: clean enough to use daily, effective enough to recommend in a clinic.

settings.quote: Replaced three products with the trio. My scalp stopped itching in week two and my hair has actual movement again.
settings.author: Sarah L.

settings.quote: I'm three months in. First product range that's worked for textured curly hair without weighing it down.
settings.author: Priya M.

settings.quote: The scalp oil alone is worth the trip. Subtle but consistent results — no greasy aftermath.
settings.author: James K.

settings.quote: Quietly the most thoughtful hair care launch of the year.
Built for scalp health first; shine is a side effect.
The trichologist's hair line you've been waiting for.

settings.heading: What we measure.
settings.body: Claims are easy; numbers are harder. We publish an annual transparency report. Here are the year's highlights.

settings.label: Of our packaging is post-consumer recycled glass + aluminium
Of revenue donated to scalp-health research partners
No-questions return window. We mean it.

settings.heading: Questions worth asking.
settings.support: Can't find what you need? Email hello@heliohair.example.

settings.question: Will this work for color-treated hair?
settings.answer: Every formula is sulfate-free and gentle on color. Several products contain UV filters to reduce fade.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Most people see scalp comfort changes in week 1 and hair texture changes in week 3-4.

settings.question: Can I use the scalp oil with the cleanser?
settings.answer: Yes — the oil is designed as a pre-cleanse, or overnight 1-2× per week.

settings.question: Do you offer subscriptions?
settings.answer: Yes — 15% off, free shipping, cancel any time.

settings.question: What's your return policy?
settings.answer: 30 days, no questions. We refund the full amount.

settings.heading: One letter every fortnight.
settings.body: Notes on formulation, founder reflections, the occasional discount. We send rarely; we never sell your address.
